title: Chelsea
content:
Roof Restoration Chelsea

Providing High Quality Roof Restoration & Repairs To Residents Of Chelsea. Sandhurst Roofing provides high quality workmanship and excellent customer service to all our customers. We deliver everything from full roof restorations and repairs, to gutter installation, and more to people living in Chelsea.

Our team of experienced and knowledgeable roofers are  highly skilled in working with all roofing materials and will work on all types of roof. This includes: flat metal, cement tiled, terracotta tiled or Colorbond roofing. We will be happy to work with you on your next roofing project.

Get a Quote!

Roof & Gutter Repairs Chelsea

With over 30 years’ experience, we are one of Melbourne's most trusted family owned and operated businesses. We lead you through every part of the project and take the time to make sure that we really understand your requirements at every step.

We're licensed to help you with all your roofing needs. Whether it’s for gutter repairs or re-roofing or roof restoration; all our services are fully insured. This provides peace of mind, knowing that your roof restoration or repairs will be finished to the highest standard by our registered roof plumbers and roof tilers.

We provide Chelsea residents with an informative service and are more than happy to organise a free quote.

Get a Quote!

Gutter Repairs Chelsea

 

Gutters are one of the most important components of any roof, they carry water away from the house, ensuring that your home and it’s contents remain dry. When gutters become damaged, old and worn, they can create all types of issues for the roof, like leaks, rotting, the growth of mould and more.

At Sandhurst Roofing, we believe in using the highest quality brands and products when it comes to serving the people of Chelsea. This is why we use COLORBOND® steel for all our guttering jobs, it’s one of the most durable and reliable materials. When using COLORBOND® steel we can assure you that your guttering will last for years. We are here for all your guttering needs, just give us a call today on 0448 812 800, one of our staff will be more than happy to answer any questions you may have.

What Our Customers Say

 Steve was very punctual with coming to assess our roofing situation. He discussed with me every aspect of the job required for the replacement of our very old tin roof.This all happened at a particularly busy time for Steve’s company and he kept me up to date with the preparation of the job. Once it started it was a very slick operation completed within 4 days. I wasn’t there during the day but saw the results of progress each afternoon. They have done a very neat professional job and I am very happy with the result. Steve was a pleasure to deal with. Well done.

Cameron Kennedy-Miller
★★★★★

Quick response to request for estimate. Price matched that given by local plumber. Work commenced soon after acceptance of quote and as agreed. Standard of work very good – impressive. Corrugated iron roof replaced with ColourBond – 2 day’s work. (New insulation laid over old, no battens replaced, screwed down). Roof no longer leaking and good work around chimney flue. Adaptable to site requirements. Due regard to safety of residents and pets. Excellent site clean-up (choice of remove old iron or keep it). Would use this organisation again.

Collin Parker
★★★★★ View All Reviews

Contact the Roof Restoration Experts in Chelsea

We provide high end roofing solutions for you, whether you live in Chelsea or surrounding areas like Langwarrin,  Edithvale, Karingal, Frankston, Carrum Downs, Chelsea Heights, Seaford or Patterson Lakes. Our team of roof plumbers and tilers are here for you!

Are you ready to get your next roofing project underway? Call Steve today on 0448 812 800 for a quote or email us at info@sandhurstroofing.com.au. We will get back to you as soon as we can.
